title: Exports
description: Export users data in the selected formats. Exports are generated asynchronously so clients need to either implement pooling and wait for an export status to change to `generated` or wait for notification that is sent when export generation is complete.

from.description: Used to define date range, in YYYY-MM-DD format.

to.description: Used to define date range, in YYYY-MM-DD format.

created.title: Date created
created.description: Specifies when the export was created.

modified.title: Last modified
modified.description: Specifies when the export was last modified.

seen.title: Seen
seen.description: Marked as `true` if user has already seen the export after it was generated. If not set to `true` the system will send out a push notification after export was generated (with a slight delay).

data.title: Export data
data.description: Export data after file was uploaded to S3

valid_until.title: Valid until
valid_until.description: Specifies how long the export file links will be valid.

from.description: Used to define date range, in YYYY-MM-DD format.

to.description: Used to define date range, in YYYY-MM-DD format.

seen.title: Seen
seen.description: Marked as `true` if user has already seen the export after it was generated. If not set to `true` the system will send out a push notification after export was generated (with a slight delay).

links.title: Update export
links.description: Update an export. Currently only `seen` can be updated, all other parameters are ignored. Make sure to send an up to date `modified`.

modified.title: Last modified
modified.description: Specifies when the export was last modified.

seen.title: Seen
seen.description: Marked as `true` if user has already seen the export after it was generated. If not set to `true` the system will send out a push notification after export was generated (with a slight delay).
